decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to utilize control cards and Dimir creatures to disrupt and outvalue the opponent. By combining removal spells, hand disruption, and counter spells with powerful creatures like Harvester of Misery and Overlord of the Balemurk, the deck aims to control the game and grind out a win through card advantage. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Restless Reef and Gloomlake Verge provide extra value and resources to stay ahead in the game. The deck's strategy revolves around disrupting the opponent's game plan while establishing a strong board presence to secure victory.

Utilizing a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive strategy. By combining the evasive abilities of Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner with the card advantage from Enduring Curiosity and Deep-Cavern Bat, players can maintain pressure while disrupting their opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Tishana's Tidebinder provide removal and control options to help secure victory. With a strong focus on tempo and efficient threats, this Dimir Aggro deck looks to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in order to achieve victory.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana and playing low-cost creatures in order to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. By utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Fecund Greenshell to ramp up mana production, along with powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to pressure opponents early on, the goal is to maintain a relentless assault and win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.Overall, this Mono Green Aggro deck aims to win quickly through the efficient use of mana and powerful creatures.

The deck focuses on creating powerful combos by reanimating key creatures from the graveyard. It utilizes cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery to put pressure on the opponent while playing control with counterspells like Deadly Cover-Up. The deck also includes card draw and graveyard recursion to set up its combos efficiently. The goal is to generate advantage through repeated reanimation and powerful effects, ultimately overwhelming the opponent with a lethal combination of threats and disruption.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive flying creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to establish early board presence with cards like Dragonhawk and Momo, then back them up with powerful dragons like Nova Hellkite and Magmatic Hellkite. With cards like Burst Lightning and Clarion Conqueror to control the board, this deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant and Multiversal Passage provide additional flexibility and utility to adapt to different matchups.

This deck focuses on quickly playing aggressive creatures to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. With a combination of powerful dragons and burn spells, it aims to control the board and put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The inclusion of Cavern of Souls helps ensure that the high mana cost dragons can be cast without being countered. The deck also includes some removal spells and card draw options to maintain a strong board presence and keep the pressure on the opponent.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures from the Mono Green Aggro archetype. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub, Icetill Explorer, and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure early in the game. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension help to pump up your creatures and push through for quick damage. With a strong mana base and additional support cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage, this deck aims to swarm the opponent and win through efficient and aggressive plays.

The deck revolves around quickly filling up the graveyard with high impact creatures and then bringing them back into play through various combos and reanimation spells. Key cards like Superior Spider-Man, Harvester of Misery, and Doomsday Excruciator provide powerful threats that can overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Intimidation Tactics and Stock Up to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own creatures. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent by leveraging its graveyard and reanimation abilities to create a strong board presence.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with high-speed, aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to quickly deal damage and control the board with efficient removal options like Lightning Helix and Shock. The mixture of creatures with abilities like haste and damage dealing spells allows for a fast-paced game plan that aims to end the game before the opponent can stabilize. This deck excels at putting pressure on opponents early and maintaining that momentum throughout the match.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells. By using cards like Bitter Triumph, Harvester of Misery, and Insatiable Avarice, players can set up devastating combos and overwhelm their opponent with a strong board presence. The deck also includes control elements like Deadly Cover-Up and Intimidation Tactics to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The goal is to efficiently utilize resources and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory through powerful reanimated creatures.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with aggressive creatures like Marauding Mako and Flamewake Phoenix, supported by powerful equipment like Bloodthorn Flail. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Multiversal Passage and Monument to Endurance to ensure consistent mana and card advantage. The strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early aggression and efficient removal, utilizing the deck's synergy and versatility to maintain pressure and control the pace of the game.

The main concept of this Dimir Aggro deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By using cards like Floodpits Drowner and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, you can put pressure on your opponent early and keep them on the back foot. In addition, cards like Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff can disrupt your opponent's strategy while you build up your board presence. The deck also includes cards like Enduring Curiosity and Tishana's Tidebinder to provide card advantage and control the board.

The deck focuses on efficiently filling up the graveyard with key creatures and then bringing them back to the battlefield for powerful synergies and combos. Cards like Deceit and Winternight Stories facilitate graveyard setup, while Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery provide strong creatures to reanimate. Superior Spider-Man is a versatile threat that can be reanimated for additional value. Utilizing cards like Bitter Triumph and Insatiable Avarice for card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its graveyard-based strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a game-ending combo. It utilizes cards like Restless Reef and Multiversal Passage to dump creatures into the graveyard, while also running reanimation spells like Deadly Cover-Up and Winternight Stories. The deck also includes cards like Bitter Triumph and Stock Up to help dig for combo pieces and protect key creatures. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats through reanimation and combo potential.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive mono green creatures and generate a strong board presence early in the game. By utilizing cards like Ba Sing Se, Badgermole Cub, and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to apply pressure and deal damage swiftly. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Sapling Nursery and Mightform Harmonizer helps to maintain board advantage and provide additional resources. The deck also incorporates some control elements with Escape Tunnel and Archdruid's Charm to disrupt the opponent's strategy while continuing to build up a powerful green aggro deck.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back into play through various reanimation spells and abilities. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of strong creatures and disruptive spells, taking advantage of the graveyard as a resource. The strategy involves carefully managing resources and timing the reanimation spells for maximum impact, while also controlling the board with removal spells and card draw. The deck thrives on synergy between its cards and aims to create a powerful reanimation engine to outpace and outclass the opponent.
